# mbutils

R package with Mel’s utilities for data science projects and (Quarto)
web publishing.

In particular this package includes **Bootstrap** themes and color
scales for **base R graphics**, **lattice** and **ggplot**, implementing
the (recent) [brand.yml](https://posit-dev.github.io/brand-yml/)
flexible document branding system.

This feature allows for logos, primary colors, color palettes and fonts
to be specified and swapped across projects and clients using run-time
YAML config files and well-known Bootstrap Sass variables. This package
includes (my personal) themes and additional utilities to flexibly turn
Bootstrap features on/off.

## Installation

You can install this package from the development version on GitHub:

``` r

if (!require("pak")) install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("mbacou/mbutils")
```

## Documentation

For complete R package documentation and technical guides, see the
[package vignette](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/).

My default (opinionated) plots with custom sizing and spacing and a
default X-axis on the right.

``` r

library(mbutils)
brand_on(bg="transparent")

set.seed(1)
x <- runif(100, min = -5, max = 5)
y <- x ^ 3 + rnorm(100, mean = 0, sd = 5)

plot(x, y, type="h", col=(y>0)+4, nx=NULL,
  main="Bootstrap Branded Plot", sub="My Subtitle",
  xlab="X Units", ylab="Y Units")
abline(h=0, col=pal.brand("red"), lwd=2)
legend(names(pal.brand())[4:5], lty=1, lwd=2, col=4:5)

brand_off()
```

![Sample branded plot](./reference/figures/example.png)

Sample branded plot

License](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) version 3 or later.

# Package index

## Bootstrap branding

Utilities to apply **branding** to R plots

- [`brand_on()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/brand_on.md)
  : Apply Boostrap brand to graphic devices and plots
- [`brand_off()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/brand_off.md)
  : Turn Bootstrap brand off
- [`brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/brand.md) :
  Fetch Bootstrap branding
- [`pal.brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/pal.brand.md)
  : Bootstrap color palette
- [`brand.colors()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/brand.colors.md)
  : Bootstrap color ramp
- [`thematic_brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/thematic_brand.md)
  : Thematic-ally apply Bootstrap brand to base, lattice and ggplot2
  graphics

## Branded base R plots

Opinionated **plot** customizations

- [`axes()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/axes.md) :
  Bootstrap-branded axes and labels for base R graphics
- [`par.brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/par.brand.md)
  : Graphical parameters for Bootstrap branded plots
- [`plot_brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/plot_brand.md)
  : Wrapper for base plot()
- [`legend_brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/legend_brand.md)
  : Wrapper for graphics::legend()

## Branded ggplot2 scales, axes and legend

Opinionated **ggplot2** customizations

- [`ggbrand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/ggbrand.md) :
  Bootstrap-branded ggplot with custom axis and legend
- [`scale_brand_cc()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/scale_brand_cc.md)
  : Continuous color scale with Bootstrap colors
- [`scale_brand_cf()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/scale_brand_cf.md)
  : Continuous fill scale with Bootstrap colors
- [`scale_brand_dc()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/scale_brand_dc.md)
  : Discrete color scale with Bootstrap colors
- [`scale_brand_df()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/scale_brand_df.md)
  : Discrete fill scale with Bootstrap colors
- [`thematic_brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/thematic_brand.md)
  : Thematic-ally apply Bootstrap brand to base, lattice and ggplot2
  graphics
- [`theme_brand()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/theme_brand.md)
  : Bootsrap-branded ggplot theme

## Utilities

Misc helper functions

- [`curr()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/curr.md) :
  Format currencies
- [`pct()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/pct.md) : Format
  percentages
- [`yday_to_date()`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/yday_to_date.md)
  : Format yday dates

## Boostrap themes

Built-in themes, package datasets, data dictionaries…

- [`BRAND`](https://mbacou.github.io/mbutils/reference/BRAND.md) :
  Built-in default Bootstrap brand
